fixes.summary: Loosen schema_version / phase checks to any tls-* / TLS-* prefix while keeping shape validation strict.
fixes.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/artifactLoaderPriority.test.ts: accepts the current tls-06.v1 schema version

fixes.summary: If the canonical top-level priority artifact is missing, fall back to artifacts/tls/system_dependency_priority_report.json. Loader records source_path so operator can see which path served the artifact.
fixes.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/artifactLoaderPriority.test.ts: falls back to artifacts/tls path when only the TLS sibling exists

fixes.summary: Surface PRIORITY_RECOMPUTE_COMMAND in every fail-closed result so the operator gets exact remediation: 'python scripts/build_tls_dependency_priority.py ... && python scripts/build_dashboard_3ls_with_tls.py'.
fixes.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/artifactLoaderPriority.test.ts: returns missing when artifact does not exist (and exposes recompute_command); UI renders top3-recompute-command testid

behavior_now.valid_top_level_artifact_present: renders exactly Top 3 cards from artifact, no re-ranking
behavior_now.only_tls_sibling_present: loader publishes/exposes the tls/ artifact via fallback path; Top 3 still renders
behavior_now.invalid_schema: fail-closed warning includes shape_mismatch reason and recompute_command
behavior_now.blocked_signal_or_freeze_signal: cards still render; warning announces control_signal so CDE/SEL can adjudicate
behavior_now.stale_artifact: cards render with stale warning; no silent acceptance
